Title: Resonate
Description: Appends a parallel glyph chain to an ally's active hex construct. Can transfer mana to the construct's owner or directly to entities with a mana pool.

target.Label: Target
target.Description: Hex construct entities to resonate with

mana.Label: Mana
mana.Description: Percentage of caster mana to transfer to target (0-100)

Next.Label: Next
Next.Description: The next glyph in the execution chain
